title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLIII. Relics.
content:
Blow, wind, blow! and go, mill, go!
        That the miller may grind his corn;
        That the baker may take it,
        And into rolls make it,
        And send us some hot in the morn.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXLIII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
